headline: How TurboTax Upselling and FedNow Integration At Intuit (INTU) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, Intuit has drawn attention as analysts highlighted a sharp customer shift toward higher-priced TurboTax services and the company confirmed it has completed the Federal Reserve’s FedNow certification, expanding instant payment capabilities for small businesses. This combination of richer TurboTax mix and new real-time payments infrastructure is reshaping how Intuit monetizes tax preparation and cash-flow tools across its platform. We’ll now examine how the stronger uptake of...
